creator: yeetaayraol@gmail.com
text:
I visited the link you shared https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=dialog&sektion=3#DEFINITIONS In my view, the feature is not ready if there are disputes over where to place it.

Although libXrender is a different https://snake-io.io package, it's possible that xserver also needs support.

I'm not the final authority on this, though, so if other maintainers agree that adding this is acceptable, I won't object.
